channel.title: Xiaomi 13 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 13 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.3.0.VLLCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi Civi 2 China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi Civi 2 China

Codename: ziyi

Version: OS3.0.3.0.VLLCNXM | 15.0

Size: 7.9 GB

MD5: 563ff71b9402318c6e2d42591fcdee76

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Improved system stability to prevent occasional app crashes
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
